## Amazon expands warehouse battery supply deal with Electrovaya

The Electrovaya expansion is a marginal operational note, not a thesis mover; it may be worth tracking as part of AMZN's fulfillment infrastructure capex narrative but does not materially affect the cloud or AI growth thesis.

- AMZN extends its relationship with Electrovaya to cover additional warehouse operations.
- The deal is an operational/capex item covering energy storage for fulfillment infrastructure.
- No financial terms, scale, or strategic AI connection are specified in the headline.
- Medium confidence; not a core thesis driver.
